claim: A 5x5x5 k-point grid was found to be sufficient for a converged DFT energy of the rutile-IrO2 bulk.
The anatase-TiO2 bulk lattice parameter was a = 3.785 and c = 9.514.
The surface energy of a (100) MgO surface is 61.8 meV/Å^2.
The optimized lattice constants of bulk forsterite (Mg2SiO4) are a = 4.7654 Å, b = 10.2396 Å, and c = 5.9984 Å
A gamma point calculation was found to be sufficient for a converged DFT energy of the rutile-IrO2 bulk.
The in-plane Li-Li distance in a Li2O (111) stoichiometric surface is 3.78Å.
